title: Tepic, Nayarit — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]

Overview

Tepic is a city in Nayarit with a population of 425,942. Capital of Nayarit with a beautiful historic center, nearby beaches, and the famous San Pedro Lagunillas.
